violations: Gate 3 — Required test missing: spec 'Required tests' mandates a live integration test (skipped in CI unless ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and SWORN_LIVE_TESTS=1) calling Verify() with a 'Reply with PASS.' system prompt and asserting the returned text contains 'PASS'. A repo-wide grep for SWORN_LIVE_TESTS returns zero hits; anthropic_test.go has no t.Skip and no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY guard. The test was never authored. proof.md 'Not delivered' mischaracterises this as 'not run' (execution deferral) when the actual defect is 'not implemented' (test absent). Remediation is a legal implementer fix: author the t.Skip-guarded live test in internal/model/anthropic_test.go checking SWORN_LIVE_TESTS=1 && ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!="", calling NewAnthropic + Verify(ctx, 'Reply with PASS.', ...) and asserting strings.Contains(text, 'PASS').

Gate 2 — Changed file not surfaced: internal/model/provider_test.go was modified by the S11 feat commit 810d7ce (removed 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6' from TestNewClient_NativeStub now that anthropic is a registered driver) but is not listed in spec.md 'Planned touchpoints', status.json actual_files, and is not explained in proof.md 'Divergence from plan'. The change is a benign in-scope companion to provider.go's registration edit, but the documentation gap violates Gate 2. Remediation: add internal/model/provider_test.go to status.json actual_files and add a one-line note in proof.md 'Divergence from plan'.
